name: Vue
author: Evan You and contributors
description: Progressive JavaScript framework used for the site UI.

name: Vue Router
author: Eduardo San Martin Morote and contributors
description: Official router for Vue.js, used for client-side navigation.

name: Vite
author: Evan You and Vite contributors
description: Frontend build tool powering the dev server and production build.

name: Tailwind CSS
author: Tailwind Labs
description: Utility-first CSS framework used for layout and components.

name: PostCSS
author: PostCSS contributors
description: CSS transformation pipeline used by the Tailwind toolchain.

name: Autoprefixer
author: Andrey Sitnik and contributors
description: Adds vendor prefixes to CSS based on browser support data.

name: TypeScript
author: Microsoft Corporation
description: Typed superset of JavaScript used for component scripts.

name: vue-tsc
author: Vue.js language tools contributors
description: TypeScript command-line wrapper that performs Vue SFC type checking.

name: Inter (Google Fonts)
author: Rasmus Andersson
description: UI sans-serif font family loaded for site typography.

name: JetBrains Mono
author: JetBrains s.r.o.
description: Monospace font family used for code and BibTeX blocks.
